items.q: Name the movie that features the character Marty McFly.
items.explanation: Marty McFly is strongly linked to Back to the Future.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Kevin McCallister.
items.explanation: Kevin McCallister is strongly linked to Home Alone.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Spider-Man: No Way Home?
items.explanation: Peter Parker is one of the defining characters in Spider-Man: No Way Home.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Star Wars?
items.explanation: Luke Skywalker is one of the defining characters in Star Wars.

items.q: Which movie features the character Katniss Everdeen?
items.explanation: Katniss Everdeen is associated with The Hunger Games.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Beauty and the Beast?
items.explanation: Belle is one of the defining characters in Beauty and the Beast.

items.q: The character Miguel appears in Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl.
items.explanation: Miguel appears in Coco, not Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Deadpool.
items.explanation: Deadpool is strongly linked to Deadpool.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Mission: Impossible - Fallout?
items.explanation: Ethan Hunt is one of the defining characters in Mission: Impossible - Fallout.

items.q: The character Marlin appears in Finding Nemo.
items.explanation: Marlin is a key character in Finding Nemo.
